PowerShell(Select-String -Path main.log -Pattern 'Missing character' -Context 0,0 | ForEach-Object { $_.LineNumber }; Select-String -Path main.log -Pattern 'l\\.\(\\d+\)' | Select-Object -First 5; \(Select-String -Path main.log -Pattern 'Missing character'\).Count)

PowerShell($log = Get-Content main.log; $hits = Select-String -Path main.log -Pattern 'Missing character'; $hits | ForEach-Object { $ln = $_.LineNumber; for\($i=$ln-1; $i -ge [Math]::Max\(0,$ln-12\); $i--\){ if\($log[$i-1] -match 'main\\.tex:\(\\d+\)'\){ $Matches[1]; break } } } | Sort-Object -Unique)
